tasks.prompt:
Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.
All on-canvas text must be in Simplified Chinese only, except unavoidable product or model names.
Do not use English headings, translated body text, UI labels, or bilingual duplication unless explicitly requested.
Role: cover.
Image grammar: hook_cover.
Purpose: Compress the article's main idea into one visual system that is understandable in one glance..
Diagram type: comparison_board.
Concept summary: 这不是又一条“国产模型上新”的热闹消息。Latent Space 在 2026 年 3 月 19 日点出的重点很直接：MiniMax 2.7 的价值不在参数表，而在它把“能不能用”迅速改写成了“为什么还不用更便宜的那一个”。.
Style direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first; Use baoyu-cover-image + baoyu-article-illustrator + baoyu-infographic style assets as the default visual language..
Background: warm cream paper-like background.
Primary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.
Line work: soft dark gray line work.
Scene elements: one dominant visual idea, 2-4 large visual nodes max, clear title area, one obvious structure, one focal visual occupying roughly 60-70% area, icon-based metaphor instead of literal screenshots, clean title zone with breathing room, left-vs-right split board with one decisive divider, bold symbolic shapes, minimal micro-details.
Key relationships to visualize: present one question and one promise, make the article worth clicking in one glance, make the core judgment visible within one glance, show one tension and one payoff only.
Layout pattern: split_comparison_center_divider.
Diagram focus: single central system diagram.
Text position: right.
Text budget: no more than 2 major text blocks on the image.
Headline budget: <= 16 Chinese characters.
Subheadline budget: <= 16 Chinese characters.
Label budget: <= 8 Chinese characters per label.
Label count budget: <= 4 labels.
On-canvas headline: "把同级开源模型的成本打到了三".
On-canvas subheadline: "不是追平 GLM-5".
Grammar rules: This is a hook-first cover, not a summary board. Show one tension or one question and one payoff only. Use 2-4 large visual nodes max. Do not turn the article into a dense chart.
Must have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, ample whitespace and one dominant focal structure, flat color blocks with clear line hierarchy, layout-first visual storytelling instead of decorative art, section visuals must map to explicit layout grammar (hub-spoke / linear-progression / comparison-matrix / bento-grid), wide editorial banner, clean empty space, flat shapes with restrained accents, short labels only, prefer conceptual composition over decorative scene rendering, preserve warm off-white background and restrained accent colors.
Must avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, busy ornamental textures that reduce readability, style drift between cover and inline images, paragraph-like dense text rendered inside image blocks, no photorealism, no dense paragraphs in image, no random sci-fi effects, do not mimic generic social banner aesthetics, avoid full-image text walls or dense annotation.
Additional direction: Make this a hook-first cover. One question or tension, one promise, not a dense summary. Source context: latentspacepod Style profile: baoyu-cover-image: editorial-infographic (conceptual + warm + hand-drawn). Cover should feel like an editorial infographic hero image with calm hand-drawn confidence. Apply baoyu-cover-image preset editorial-infographic with conceptual composition. Apply hand-drawn organic line quality with controlled imperfection and clean hierarchy. Use warm palette behavior: cream base, warm action accent, cool structure accent. Style….
The result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.
Keep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.
Do not simply render the article's paragraph text into the image.

Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.
All on-canvas text must be in Simplified Chinese only, except unavoidable product or model names.
Do not use English headings, translated body text, UI labels, or bilingual duplication unless explicitly requested.
Role: inline.
Image grammar: example_comparison.
Purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block..
Diagram type: comparison_board.
Concept summary: 很多模型发布，热度都死在标题里。这次不太一样。2026 年 3 月 19 日，`@latentspacepod` 转发的 AINews 用一句很硬的概括把重点钉住了：**MiniMax 2.7，追平 GLM-5，同级成本只要三分之一**。.
Style direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first; Use baoyu-cover-image + baoyu-article-illustrator + baoyu-infographic style assets as the default visual language..
Background: warm cream paper-like background.
Primary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.
Line work: soft dark gray line work.
Scene elements: left card vs right card, center arrow, one bottom takeaway, few text blocks, two-column contrast with one takeaway strip, evidence markers aligned by criterion.
Key relationships to visualize: make the before/after or old/new contrast obvious, show why one example proves the point.
Layout pattern: comparison_matrix.
Diagram focus: before/after evidence contrast.
Text position: integrated.
Text budget: no more than 4 major text blocks on the image.
Headline budget: <= 12 Chinese characters.
Subheadline budget: <= 10 Chinese characters.
Label budget: <= 8 Chinese characters per label.
Label count budget: <= 6 labels.
On-canvas headline: "这不是又一条“国产模型…".
On-canvas subheadline: "一个具体例子就够了".
Grammar rules: Use a left-vs-right or before-vs-after structure. One example should prove the section point immediately. Avoid extra supporting text blocks.
Must have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, ample whitespace and one dominant focal structure, flat color blocks with clear line hierarchy, layout-first visual storytelling instead of decorative art, section visuals must map to explicit layout grammar (hub-spoke / linear-progression / comparison-matrix / bento-grid), keep labels short, focus on one concept only, maintain same house style as cover, one image = one clear job, support section transition and comprehension reset.
Must avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, busy ornamental textures that reduce readability, style drift between cover and inline images, paragraph-like dense text rendered inside image blocks, no decorative filler, no unrelated icons, no decorative image blocks without structural meaning.
Additional direction: Use the example_comparison grammar. This is one visual job, not a paragraph summary: 这不是又一条“国产模型上新”的热闹消息。Latent… Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: knowledge-base (infographic + vector-illustration). Inline image should behave like a section explainer card with fast scan value. Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: versus (comparison + vector-illustration). Use comparison-matrix thinking: align differences by one common axis..
The result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.
Keep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.
Do not simply render the article's paragraph text into the image.

Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.
All on-canvas text must be in Simplified Chinese only, except unavoidable product or model names.
Do not use English headings, translated body text, UI labels, or bilingual duplication unless explicitly requested.
Role: inline.
Image grammar: example_comparison.
Purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block..
Diagram type: quadrant_map.
Concept summary: 模型圈很容易把“追平”写成一件平淡的事，好像只要不是绝对领先，就只是第二名新闻。但实际落地里，很多团队并不需要“唯一最强”的模型，他们需要的是**足够强，同时更容易部署、更能控成本、更适合进生产环境**的模型。.
Style direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first; Use baoyu-cover-image + baoyu-article-illustrator + baoyu-infographic style assets as the default visual language..
Background: warm cream paper-like background.
Primary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.
Line work: soft dark gray line work.
Scene elements: left card vs right card, center arrow, one bottom takeaway, few text blocks, two-column contrast with one takeaway strip, evidence markers aligned by criterion.
Key relationships to visualize: make the before/after or old/new contrast obvious, show why one example proves the point.
Layout pattern: comparison_matrix.
Diagram focus: before/after evidence contrast.
Text position: integrated.
Text budget: no more than 4 major text blocks on the image.
Headline budget: <= 12 Chinese characters.
Subheadline budget: <= 10 Chinese characters.
Label budget: <= 8 Chinese characters per label.
Label count budget: <= 6 labels.
On-canvas headline: "真正值得看的，不是追平…".
On-canvas subheadline: "一个具体例子就够了".
Use short Chinese labels only: 真正值得看的, 不是追平, 而是追平的方式.
Grammar rules: Use a left-vs-right or before-vs-after structure. One example should prove the section point immediately. Avoid extra supporting text blocks.
Must have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, ample whitespace and one dominant focal structure, flat color blocks with clear line hierarchy, layout-first visual storytelling instead of decorative art, section visuals must map to explicit layout grammar (hub-spoke / linear-progression / comparison-matrix / bento-grid), keep labels short, focus on one concept only, maintain same house style as cover, one image = one clear job, support section transition and comprehension reset.
Must avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, busy ornamental textures that reduce readability, style drift between cover and inline images, paragraph-like dense text rendered inside image blocks, no decorative filler, no unrelated icons, no decorative image blocks without structural meaning.
Additional direction: Use the example_comparison grammar. This is one visual job, not a paragraph summary: 真正值得看的，不是追平，而是追平的方式 Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: knowledge-base (infographic + vector-illustration). Inline image should behave like a section explainer card with fast scan value. Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: versus (comparison + vector-illustration). Use comparison-matrix thinking: align differences by one common axis..
The result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.
Keep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.
Do not simply render the article's paragraph text into the image.

Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.
All on-canvas text must be in Simplified Chinese only, except unavoidable product or model names.
Do not use English headings, translated body text, UI labels, or bilingual duplication unless explicitly requested.
Role: inline.
Image grammar: decision_board.
Purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block..
Diagram type: system_stack.
Concept summary: 第一类是已经在比较开源模型、但预算始终压得很紧的团队。你未必需要再多一点纸面领先，你更需要的是把同等级能力放进现有预算里。标题里那句“1/3 cost”之所以刺眼，就是因为它直接对应采购、调用量和持续运营成本。.
Style direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first; Use baoyu-cover-image + baoyu-article-illustrator + baoyu-infographic style assets as the default visual language..
Background: warm cream paper-like background.
Primary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.
Line work: soft dark gray line work.
Scene elements: 3-4 decision cards, priority contrast, one short rule takeaway, 3-4 decision cards with priority ordering, criteria labels and pass/fail markers.
Key relationships to visualize: show how to decide quickly, make priority ordering obvious.
Layout pattern: decision_matrix_cards.
Diagram focus: criteria-based decision at a glance.
Text position: integrated.
Text budget: no more than 3 major text blocks on the image.
Headline budget: <= 12 Chinese characters.
Subheadline budget: <= 12 Chinese characters.
Label budget: <= 8 Chinese characters per label.
Label count budget: <= 5 labels.
On-canvas headline: "这条消息对谁最有用".
On-canvas subheadline: "这张图只回答怎么判断".
Use short Chinese labels only: 这条消息对谁最….
Grammar rules: Make the decision logic instantly obvious. Use 3-4 cards or tiers max. Support fast skimming.
Must have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, ample whitespace and one dominant focal structure, flat color blocks with clear line hierarchy, layout-first visual storytelling instead of decorative art, section visuals must map to explicit layout grammar (hub-spoke / linear-progression / comparison-matrix / bento-grid), keep labels short, focus on one concept only, maintain same house style as cover, one image = one clear job, support section transition and comprehension reset.
Must avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, busy ornamental textures that reduce readability, style drift between cover and inline images, paragraph-like dense text rendered inside image blocks, no decorative filler, no unrelated icons, no decorative image blocks without structural meaning.
Additional direction: Use the decision_board grammar. This is one visual job, not a paragraph summary: 这条消息对谁最有用 Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: knowledge-base (infographic + vector-illustration). Inline image should behave like a section explainer card with fast scan value. Style profile: baoyu-infographic: comparison-matrix. Use decision matrix layout with clear criteria and recommendation signal..
The result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.
Keep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.
Do not simply render the article's paragraph text into the image.

Concept summary: 这类消息最容易出现两种误读。第一种误读是，只看见“又一个新版本”，然后自动归类为厂商例行发版。第二种误读是，只看见“追平 SOTA”，于是把它当成排行榜新闻。.
Style direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first; Use baoyu-cover-image + baoyu-article-illustrator + baoyu-infographic style assets as the default visual language..
